notes:
### v1.1.1

#### ✨ New Features
- **Progression Planner** — New sidebar tab with full market data infrastructure
- **Market Data Module** — Separate database with live prices from LOA Buddy API (EUC, hourly refresh)
  - Engravings (43 items), Honing Materials (36 items), Additional Honing Materials (21 items)
  - Gems (40 items): T3/T4 Damage & Cooldown Lv.1-10 (manual price input)
- **Price History Charts** — Click any item to view a 30-day price graph with min/max/avg lines and 7d/14d/30d toggle
- **Manual Price Override** — Set custom prices for any item with visual override badge

#### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed roster import failing silently for rosters with low combat power characters (score < 1.0)
- Roster scraper now detects Cloudflare blocks and retries automatically (up to 3 attempts)

#### 🔧 Improvements
- Reduced post-scrape delays from ~10s to ~1s
- Removed redundant Planned Features sidebar section
